prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类最低位次约3201→3474→4335→4618→5402，呈持续后移趋势，近4年累计后移约2200名，2025年基准约5402名；该校在湖南省物理类招生计划2021年140人、2022年142人、2023年82人（当年专业组调整）、2024年132人、2025年139人；2026年计划136人，较2025年小幅缩招3人，缩招幅度约2.2%，按供需弹性原理缩招使竞争略有缓解。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校，C9联盟成员；软科中国大学排名2021–2026年均稳居第10名，属于全国顶尖高校梯队；2026年声誉评价偏负面，主要涉及师德师风事件（领导被举报不正当关系，校方回应为谣言），但整体关注度有限；抖音热度排名第24位（较热），短视频曝光量中等偏上；历史投档异常记录中未见西安交大断档信号，报考心理总体平稳；第五轮学科评估A+学科：动力工程及工程热物理、电气工程、机械工程、控制科学与工程；A学科：力学、数学、材料科学与工程、工商管理、管理科学与工程、计算机科学与技术、马克思主义理论；A-学科：生物医学工程、电子科学与技术。优势学科覆盖该校在湘招生的大部分工科试验班类专业。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程及其自动化等专业2024–2026年持续高热推荐，社会报考热度高；湖南省2026年物理类考生约34.7万人，较2025年32.0万人增加约2.7万人（+8.4%），考生规模扩大推高竞争烈度；西安交通大学位于陕西省西安市，在湖南省无特殊地域偏好；该校在陕招生占比约20%–25%，在湘招生约130–140人，属跨省招生正常水平。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次持续后移趋势、2026年小幅缩招（139→136人）、湖南省物理类考生大幅增加（+8.4%）、学校顶尖层次与优势学科吸引力强、专业热度持续高位等因素，预计2026年竞争较2025年略有加剧。预测最低位次约5400名，区间4925–5875名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 3201 → 3474 → 4335 → 4618 → 5402, showing a continuous backward trend, with a cumulative backward shift of about 2200 places in the past 4 years. The 2025 baseline is about 5402. The university's enrollment plan for Physics Category in Hunan Province was 140 in 2021, 142 in 2022, 82 in 2023 (due to major group adjustments that year), 132 in 2024, and 139 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 136, a slight reduction of 3 students compared to 2025, a reduction rate of about 2.2%. According to the principle of supply-demand elasticity, the reduction slightly eases competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class construction university, a member of the C9 League. In the Soft Science Chinese University Rankings from 2021 to 2026, it has consistently ranked 10th, belonging to the top tier of national universities. In 2026, the reputation evaluation is slightly negative, mainly involving a teacher ethics incident (a leader was reported for improper relationships, and the university responded that it was a rumor), but overall attention is limited. Douyin popularity ranking is 24th (relatively popular), with short video exposure at an upper-medium level. There is no signal of a cutoff drop for Xi'an Jiaotong University in historical abnormal application records, and the application psychology is generally stable. A+ disciplines in the fifth round of discipline evaluation: Power Engineering and Engineering Thermophysics, Electrical Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, Control Science and Engineering. A disciplines: Mechanics, Mathematics, Materials Science and Engineering, Business Administration, Management Science and Engineering, Computer Science and Technology, Marxist Theory. A- disciplines: Biomedical Engineering, Electronic Science and Technology. The advantageous disciplines cover most of the Engineering Experimental Class majors that the university recruits in Hunan.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering and Automation have been continuously highly recommended from 2024 to 2026, with high social application popularity. In 2026, the number of Physics Category examinees in Hunan Province is about 347,000, an increase of about 27,000 (+8.4%) compared to 320,000 in 2025. The expansion of the examinee scale intensifies competition. Xi'an Jiaotong University is located in Xi'an, Shaanxi Province, with no special regional preference in Hunan Province. The university's enrollment proportion in Shaanxi is about 20%–25%, and in Hunan it is about 130–140, which is a normal level for cross-provincial enrollment.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous backward trend of historical rankings, the slight reduction in enrollment in 2026 (139→136), the significant increase in Physics Category examinees in Hunan Province (+8.4%), the strong appeal of the university's top tier and advantageous disciplines, and the persistently high popularity of majors, it is expected that competition in 2026 will be slightly more intense than in 2025. The predicted minimum ranking is about 5400, with a range of 4925–5875.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If the ranking is within the predicted range of 4925–5875, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 Engineering Experimental Classes as the main choice, aim for Tier 1 Qian Xuesen Class/Top Talent Program as a reach, and use Tier 3 Economics Category/Medical Experimental Class as safety. If the ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (<4925), focus on impacting Tier 1 flagship majors. If the ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (>5875), it is recommended to mainly choose Tier 3, supplemented by Tier 2 marginal majors.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for History Category was approximately 993 → 1010 → 862 → 952 → 1053, fluctuating within the 850–1060 range overall, with a baseline of about 1053 in 2025; the university's enrollment plan for History Category in Hunan Province was 10 students in 2021, 12 in 2022, 15 in 2023, 15 in 2024, and 15 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 14 students, a slight reduction of 1 student compared to 2025, a reduction of about 6.7%. According to the principle of supply-demand elasticity, the reduction slightly eases competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university, a member of the C9 League; the Soft Science China University Rankings from 2021 to 2026 consistently rank it 10th, placing it among the top universities nationwide; the 2026 reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, mainly involving teacher ethics incidents, but overall attention is limited; Douyin popularity ranking is 24th (relatively popular); no signs of a cutoff in historical admission anomalies for Xi'an Jiaotong University, with generally stable application psychology; Marxist Theory is rated A (fifth round), related to the Liberal Arts Experimental Class (including Philosophy, Sociology, Chinese Language and Literature) and Public Administration; Law has no separate rating (Business Administration is rated A), and the International Economic and Trade Rules major relies on the Law direction; Foreign Languages and Literature has no separate rating.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Law major has mixed social popularity and is watched, Foreign Language major is generally watched, Chinese Language/Chinese major is recommended; in 2026, the number of History Category examinees in Hunan Province is about 187,000, an increase of about 44,500 (+31.2%) from 142,500 in 2025, significantly boosting competition intensity; Xi'an Jiaotong University is located in Xi'an, Shaanxi Province, with no special regional preference in Hunan; the university's History Category enrollment in Hunan is only 14–15 students, a small-scale enrollment, making ranking fluctuations sensitive to plan changes.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the historical ranking fluctuation range (850–1060), the slight enrollment reduction in 2026 (15→14), the surge in History Category examinees in Hunan Province (+31.2%), and the strong appeal of the university's top tier, competition in 2026 is expected to intensify significantly compared to 2025. The predicted minimum ranking is about 1050, with a range of 924–1176.
